article.title: Noizekid: Moombahton and Dancehall Production in Mexico
article.subtitle: A profile of the Mexican producer known for collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer recognized for his work with prominent names in the music industry and his release of the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his collaborations with prominent figures in the music industry, including DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.
He has released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, a collection that includes all of his samples, loops, and drums used in various of his works.
His production style is rooted in the energetic rhythms of moombahton and dancehall, reflecting a distinct approach to electronic music production.
Noizekid's work is further contextualized by his associations with similar artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot.
